tracks.rawText: 0:33[Rec] Mar 30 16:41:44UploadSamba-rock with heavy funk influence, The arrangement features a prominent brass section with trumpets and saxophones playing syncopated staccato stabs, A clean-tone electric guitar plays percussive 16th-note scratches and rhythmic chords, The bass guitar follows a busy, melodic line with frequent slides and syncopation, Percussion includes a high-tuned snare drum, crisp hi-hats, and agogô bells, The tempo is 115 BPM in 4/4 timePublishRemix
